title: Kana Vocab 47: コンセント, サークル, サイレン...

items.gloss: electrical outlet; wall socket; power plug
group with a common interest (e.g. students); club (e.g. company sports club); circle; circle (shape)
office worker; company employee; company man; salaryman (stereotypical Japanese office worker)
sample; example; specimen; display model (e.g. plastic food models used by restaurants)
season (period in which regulated games are played); season (division of the year); season (of a TV show, etc.); season (for doing something, e.g. ski season, entrance examination season)
